gate.pickAll: Choose your language · தமிழ் தேர்வு · ഭാഷ തിരഞ്ഞെടുക്കുക
gate.caveat: Tamil & Malayalam text (incl. fish names) is an early draft and needs native-speaker review before launch.

today.s_go: Calm seas and good fishing close to shore. Fine conditions to head out.
today.s_ch_ok: Some fish likely offshore — calm enough to head out if you're ready.
today.s_ch_low: Few fish expected today — only go if you need to.
today.s_check_very_stale: This is yesterday's reading — conditions may have changed.
today.s_check_very_stale_rough: This is yesterday's reading and seas were rough — check before you go.
today.s_caution: You can fish, but the sea is rough. Stay near the coast and check before you go.
today.s_stop: A severe weather warning is on for your coast. Do not go out today — safety first.
today.cached: Showing yesterday's saved advice. Connect to update.
today.lowData: Clouds are blocking the sea reading. Advice will update soon.
today.weatherCaution: Small boats should stay close to shore.
today.disc: This advice comes from satellite data. The real sea can be different. Always follow safety rules.
today.gearNoMatch: Your current gear may not suit this zone.
today.rangeOut: A stronger zone is past your boat's range today.
today.errorBody: The forecast is not available right now. Check your connection and try again.
today.noReachableTitle: No good spots within your range today
today.noReachableSub: All fishing zones are too far for your boat. Try another coast or check back tomorrow.
today.emptyTitle: No fishing-zone data for this coast/day yet
today.emptySub: Try another day or a different coast.
today.noBoatTitle: Add your boat to get advice
today.noBoatSub: We need your boat's range and gear to find spots you can reach.
today.staleAdviceBanner: This advice is from {{age}} — conditions may have changed.
today.s_go_stale: Calm seas and good fishing were reported. Conditions may have shifted since then.
today.s_go_very_stale: Calm seas were reported, but this advice is over a day old. Check conditions before you go.
today.s_caution_stale: Rough seas were reported. This advice is old — check today's forecast before heading out.
today.demoDay_caution_marginal: GO WITH CAUTION — slim catch, far out
today.mapOverlay: Stay in harbour — severe weather, do not sail
today.trustNote: Yesterday we said <1>{{tier}}</1> for {{zone}} — fishers there had a good catch.
today.whyPoint1: Plenty of fish food in the water.
today.whyPoint2: A warm water front where fish gather.
today.whyPoint3: Depth suits your nets and boat.
today.whyPoint4: Good catches here 5 of the last 7 days.
today.whyPoint5: From INCOIS sea data and past patterns. A guide, not a promise.
today.comingSoon: More coasts and dates coming soon
today.nativeReview: Tamil and Malayalam text is a draft — a native speaker should check it before you rely on it for fishing decisions.
today.mapFullHint: Harbour at the bottom. Best spot marked with a bearing line from your coast.
today.decisionReason_go: Calm seas and a strong catch signal within your range.
today.decisionReason_stale: This reading is old — check conditions before you head out.
today.decisionReason_very_stale: This advice is over a day old — conditions may have changed.
today.decisionReason_rough: Seas are rough — stay close to shore if you go.
today.decisionReason_low_confidence: Signals are weak — treat this as a rough guide.
today.decisionReason_not_worth: Fuel cost looks high for the catch expected today.
today.decisionReason_caution: Worth checking before you leave harbour.
today.decisionReason_unsafe: A severe weather warning is on — do not go out today.
today.decisionReason_no_reachable: Nothing worth reaching within your boat's range today.
today.decisionReason_empty: No fishing-zone data for this coast and day yet.
today.confidenceReason_very_stale: Weak — this reading is a day old

assistant.title: Ask for help
assistant.greeting: Namaskaram! Ask me about today's fishing, the weather, your past trips, or your boat.
assistant.redirect: I can help with fishing, weather, your past trips and your boat. Try: "where's the best fishing today?"
assistant.bestToday: Today the best spot is {{zone}}, about {{km}} km {{bearing}} — around {{eta}}h {{mins}}m out. Seas are {{state}}. This is a guide, not a promise — always check just before you leave.
assistant.tunaYes: Tuna are likely near {{zone}} today, about {{km}} km out. Check the zone card for details.
assistant.tunaNo: Tuna aren't in the top pick today — try Munambam Bank or check the zones list.
assistant.outOfRange: The strongest zone today is past your boat's range. Munambam Bank is your best reachable spot.
assistant.lastWeek: We were right {{correct}} of the last {{days}} days. Check the track strip for details.
assistant.noSpots: No good reachable spots in today's forecast. Try another day or coast.
assistant.noBoat: Add your boat in Settings first — then I can tell you where to fish.

confidence.reason_high_chlorophyll: Plenty of fish food in the water.
confidence.reason_thermal_front: A warm water front where fish gather.
confidence.reason_recent_success: Good catches here 5 of the last 7 days.
confidence.reason_mixed_signal: Mixed signals — some good signs, some unclear.
confidence.reason_weak_signal: Weak satellite reading — treat as a rough guide.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Boat, language, and app preferences.
settings.changeBoatHint: Switch boats before you leave harbour. Advice on Today is always for the boat set here.
settings.languageHint: Tamil and Malayalam text is a draft — a native speaker should check it before you rely on it.

zones.title: Fishing zones
zones.subtitle: Map and spot list for your coast and day.

trips.title: My trips
trips.subtitle: Saved spots and where you've fished recently.
trips.emptySavedHint: Tap Save spot on any zone to keep it here.
trips.emptyTrips: No trip history yet for this boat.
